basic_details.job_title: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kalakshetra Foundation has released the official Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. The notification invites eligible candidates aged between 45 and 55 years who have passed 10th Standard (Secondary School) or equivalent from a recognized board and possess 5 years of experience in stage arrangement in a cultural institution to attend the walkin interview on 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Secondary School (10th Standard) or equivalent from a recognized board, 5 years experience in stage arrangement in a cultural institution
qualification.details: Passed Secondary School (10th Standard) or equivalent from a recognized board. 5 years of experience in stage arrangement in a cultural institution.

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Kalakshetra Foundation Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Passed Secondary School (10th Standard) or equivalent from a recognized board. 5 years of experience in stage arrangement in a cultural institution.

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 55 years

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Kalakshetra Foundation recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kalakshetra Foundation recruitment is Theatre Assistant. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Theatre Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Theatre Assistant post as per the official notification released by Kalakshetra Foundation.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Theatre Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Secondary School (10th Standard) or equivalent from a recognized board and possess 5 years of experience in stage arrangement in a cultural institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Theatre Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Theatre Assistant post is between 45 years and 55 years. No age relaxation details are provided.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the Theatre Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attend a Walk-in Interview at the Kalakshetra Foundation office with all necessary original and self-attested documents.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled for the Theatre Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Theatre Assistant position is scheduled to be held on 23 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Walk-in Interview for the Kalakshetra Foundation Theatre Assistant recruitment conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the Kalakshetra Foundation office in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600041.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Theatre Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Theatre Assistant position is contract-based.
